## CommandDescriptor.description property

One- or two-sentence description used as both CLI help text and MCP tool description. Keep it tight — verbose descriptions inflate every agent call's token budget. Examples and flag details live in the `inputSchema` field `.describe()` annotations.

**Signature:**

```typescript
description: string;
```
